author: ahts4962
description: Display navigation links at the top of the notes.

manifest.author: ahts4962
manifest.description: Display navigation links at the top of the notes.
manifest.name: Nav Link Header

name: Nav Link Header

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# Improvements

- Redesigned the settings UI for improved readability (@Moyf, #36).
- Added Chinese (zh-CN) localization (@Moyf, #36).

# Bug fixes

- Fixed an issue where the pinned note content was not displayed in the navigation header when duplicate strings were present.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# New Features

- Added a **Merge prefixes** setting (#35). By specifying one or more prefixes, links that share the same prefix are merged into a single entry. For example, setting 🔗 will merge links such as `🔗[[Note 1]] 🔗[[Note 2]] 🔗[[Note 3]]` into `🔗[[Note 1]] [[Note 2]] [[Note 3]]` in the navigation header.

# Improvements

- Added **Link display style** settings for property links and periodic note links.
- Added double separator display styles (e.g., `<prev || parent || next>`).
- Added a **Link prefix** setting for periodic note links.
- Prev/Next/Parent links are now completely hidden when there are no links to display (e.g., when collapsed).

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# Improvements

- Adjusted phone layout to align with the latest Obsidian update (#33).

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# Improvements

- Expanded the **Annotated Links** feature to support searching within the currently open note (#31). The previous **Annotation strings** setting has been renamed to **Annotation strings for backlinks**, and a new **Annotation strings for current note** setting has been added.
- Added an option to ignore code blocks for pinned note content (#30).

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: # New features - Pinned note content (#28) - You can pin part of a note to the navigation header by inserting a specified string (for example, an emoji) into the note content. Any content following that string will be displayed in the navigation header. - - - Link Collapsing (#29) - Clicking a prefix (such as an emoji) in the navigation header collapses links that share the same prefix into a single entry. - # Known issue - Under certain conditions, collapsing links in the page preview may cause the preview to jump to the top-left corner.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# Improvements

- Added support for specifying multiple folder paths in **Folder links** → **Folder paths**, including batch specification using glob patterns (#27).
- Added **Excluded folder paths** to the **Folder links** settings (#27).
- Added **Max links** to the **Folder links** settings, enabling the display of multiple previous/next links (#27).
- Replaced the previous folder link **Regular expression** option with **Include patterns**, **Exclude patterns**, and **Enable regular expressions** to allow more flexible configuration (#27).
- Added **Link display style** to the **Folder links** settings. In addition to the original `< prev | parent | next >` format, the styles `prev | parent | next` and `prev parent next` are now available (#27).
- Added **Link prefix** to the **Folder links** settings, allowing users to add emojis or other prefixes before each link (#27).
- Changed the sorting order of folder links to numeric sort.
- Changed the sorting order of navigation header links to numeric sort.
- Added support for displaying multiple links in prev/parent/next property links. For example, if both "parent" and "up" are defined as parent properties and both are set in a note, both links will now appear in the navigation header.

# Bug fixes

- Fixed an issue where renamed periodic notes were not removed correctly from the cache.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# New features

- Added a new setting field: Implicit reciprocal property pairs (#14). See the settings page for details.
- Added support for setting prefixes (icons) for prev/next/parent links defined via file properties (#26). You can now use the syntax `property name:icon` for these types of links.

# Bug fixes

- Fixed an issue where changes to file properties were not immediately reflected in folder-specified links.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# New features

- Added "Advanced annotation strings" setting (#25). This is an enhanced version of Annotation strings that supports regular expressions. It also allows you to freely configure strings such as emojis displayed in the navigation header.
- Added "Trim whitespace in input fields" setting. This option is enabled by default. When disabled, you can include leading and trailing spaces in various string inputs.
- "Property mappings" now support colons (:) in values.

# Bug fixes

- Fixed an issue where the navigation header appeared in the backlink, outgoing-link, outline, and local graph views when "Display navigation links in other views" was enabled.
- Fixed an issue where the navigation header might not appear in the page preview when the graph view was displayed in a separate window.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# Improvements

- Navigation headers can now be displayed in other view types such as PDF, image, and video. You can toggle this on or off for each view type in the settings (#23).
- Updated UI element class names to make them easier to target with CSS snippets (#24).

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# New features

- Added an option to match the navigation width to the line length, along with a command to toggle it (#17).
- Introduced a placeholder string (`[[E]]`) that matches all emojis when searching for annotated links (#18).
- Added an option to ignore emoji variation selectors when searching for annotated links (#19).
- Added an option to hide prefixes (emojis) in annotated links (#20).
- Added support for Canvas (#21).
- Added an option to toggle visibility of loading indicator independently (#22).

# Improvements

- Improved the alignment of links in the navigation.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Fixed an issue where the navigation bar could cover the 'Open link' button in page preview.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: # New features - The function to display notes specified in file properties as links now allows you to specify external links (such as website URLs) in addition to internal links (paths to notes) (#16). Support for Markdown-style links (e.g. `[obsidian](https://obsidian.md)`, `[display text](some%20note.md)`) has also been added.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Fixed navigation not being displayed when periodic note links are enabled and a non-existent folder is specified in the Periodic Notes plugin.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# New features

- By specifying a folder path, you can now create links that allow you to navigate back and forth through the files in that folder.
- Previous, next, and parent file links can now be created using file properties.
- You can now specify the display order for all link types (#10).
- Display name can now be set via file properties for all link types.
- The display name specified in the wiki style link (e.g. `[[path|display]]`) is now also used as the display name for navigation links (this does not apply to annotated links).
- You can now specify a priority when excluding duplicate links.
- The display settings for periodic notes can now be managed in more detail.

This release contains some breaking changes to the plugin settings. I am trying to ensure that the old settings are carried over as much as possible, but there are some settings that are not completely carried over. If you notice any changes in behavior, please check the settings description carefully.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Fixed an issue where navigation links could not be clicked in some themes (#7).

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
# New features

- The navigation header now could also display notes from properties (refer to Property Mappings in the plugin settings).
- Added support for using the middle mouse button to open links in a new tab.
- Users can now select a property (e.g., title) to serve as the display name instead of the note's file name.
- An option has been added to remove duplicate links in the navigation header.

(Thanks to @Moyf in #4 and #5)

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description:
Added commands to navigate between periodic notes (#6).

- Open next periodic note
- Open parent periodic note
- Open previous periodic note

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Added an option to allow a space between the annotation string and the link (#2).

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Fixed an issue with double scrollbars in page preview in Obsidian v1.7.4.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Changed code to use Obsidian's debounce function.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: Removed lookbehind in regular expressions for iOS support.

releases.author: ahts4962
releases.description: # Initial release
